description: You are an Energy Engineer at GreenCore Engineering, contracted to design a net-zero PV system for a commercial office building. The building model (Solar_Project.skp) is open in SketchUp Make 2017 with Skelion installed. Review the energy worksheet on the Desktop (energy_worksheet.txt) for the building's energy consumption, site location, and panel specifications. Design a PV system sized to achieve net-zero generation, and produce a system sizing report documenting your design. Save the report to the Desktop.

data_sources.solar_resource: NREL PVWatts — Austin annual GHI 5.50 kWh/m2/day
